description_long: This object consists of four hardcover books with black covers, neatly aligned and supported by a wooden bookend. The books have gold embossed titles on their spines, and the pages are a light beige color, visible from the top and side views. The bookend is made of polished wood with a simple, angular design, providing sturdy support to keep the books upright. The books appear to be of standard textbook or reference size, with a uniform thickness and height. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for an office, library, or home study. There are no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the covers, giving the set a classic and understated look.
description: A set of four black hardcover books with gold spine text, supported by a polished wooden bookend. The books are neatly aligned and have a clean, professional appearance.
description_view_0: Four black books with gold spine text are shown upright, supported by a wooden bookend on the right.
description_view_1: The wooden bookend is fully visible from the end, showing its angular support structure behind the books.
description_view_2: The tops of the books are visible, revealing the light beige pages and the wooden bookend to the left.
description_view_3: The plain black back covers of the books are visible, with no text or decoration.

attribute_spine_design: The spines are black with gold embossed text running vertically. There are no decorative patterns or additional elements, giving a classic and minimalistic appearance.
